name: ExtensionPlanDefinition_Action_Input_RelatedData
title: R5: What data is provided (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `PlanDefinition.action.input.relatedData` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`PlanDefinition.action.input.relatedData` 0..1 `id`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `PlanDefinition.action.input.relatedData` 0..1 `id`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `PlanDefinition.action.input.relatedData` has a context of PlanDefinition.action.input based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `PlanDefinition`.
Element `PlanDefinition.action.input.relatedData` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.comment:
Element `PlanDefinition.action.input.relatedData` has a context of PlanDefinition.action.input based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `PlanDefinition`.
Element `PlanDefinition.action.input.relatedData` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
The relatedData element allows indicating that an input to a parent action is an input to specific child actions. It also allows the output of one action to be identified as the input to a different action

element.definition: Points to an existing input or output element that provides data to this input.
element.comment: The relatedData element allows indicating that an input to a parent action is an input to specific child actions. It also allows the output of one action to be identified as the input to a different action
